title: Chinese Beef Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful Chinese-inspired beef casserole with a rich and savory sauce.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced corned beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes, beef broth, soy sauce, oyster sauce, brown sugar, and garlic to the skillet.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
Serve over steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
